---
name: Spec feedback / proposal
about: Suggest a change or clarification to the AIGX format
title: "[spec] "
labels: spec
---

**Spec version**
Which version of the spec does this apply to? (e.g. v1.1)

**Which part of the spec?**
(link to the SPEC.md section or quote the relevant passage)

**The failure mode this addresses**
What goes wrong today that this would fix? Describe a concrete scenario.

**Proposed change**
The simplest version you can describe.

**Alternatives considered**
What else did you consider, and why did you rule it out?

**Evidence (optional but valued)**
AIGX is empirical - if you have any signal (even a small A/B on your own repo) that this changes agent
behavior, share it. Remember: n=30 is noise; power it up before trusting a result.
